items.title: Empathic Perception: A Neutral Framework for Understanding Empathy
items.author: Rosemary Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, Stephen Jonathan Whitty, Anita Louise Wheeldon
items.content: <article>Emotion Review, Ahead of Print. This paper reconceptualises evaluative processes pertinent to empathy as empathic perception: an evaluative, dynamic, and embodied process that provides morally neutral information as a perception to guide action and manage relationships. Traditional ...</article>
